BusinessName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: OPEN SPACE INSTITUTE LAND TRUST INC

IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: A SUPPORTING ORGANIZATION OF THE OPEN SPACE INSTITUTE, INC. THAT HOLDS LAND & CONSERVATION EASEMENTS.
IRS990.MissionDesc: OSILT IS A SUPPORTING ORGANIZATION OF OPEN SPACE INSTITUTE, INC., BOTH OF WHICH CONSERVE LAND TO PROTECT SCENIC, NATURAL AND HISTORIC LANDSCAPES AND TO ENSURE PUBLIC ENJOYMENT, EQUITABLE ACCESS, INTACT HABITATS AND COMMUNITY ENGAGEMENT IN LAND PROTECTION.
IRS990.Desc: LAND PROGRAM: TO CONSERVE LANDSCAPES, OSILT ACQUIRES LANDS AND CONSERVATION EASEMENTS, AND CONVEYS PROTECTED PROPERTIES TO GOVERNMENT AGENCIES, OTHER NON-PROFIT ORGANIZATIONS AND CONSERVATION BUYERS. IN 2018 OSILT PRESERVED 25,505 ACRES OF LAND HAVING A FAIR MARKET VALUE OF $23 MILLION. OSILT CONSERVES LANDS THAT OFFER MULTIPLE ECOLOGICAL AND RECREATIONAL BENEFITS. TO MINIMIZE CLIMATE CHANGE, OSILT ACQUIRES LANDS THAT OFFER MITIGATION, RESILIENCY, OR LONG-TERM PROTECTION. OSILT ALSO ACQUIRES LANDS THAT PROVIDE BROADLY ACCESSIBLE AND EQUITABLE PUBLIC ACCESS TO PARKS AND CONSERVED AREAS, AND LANDS THAT PROTECT HABITAT AND WATERSHEDS. OSILT PURCHASES LAND IN THE EASTERN UNITED STATES AND CANADA.

ProgSrvcAccomActy2Grp.Desc: PARKS AND POLICY: OSILT PROVIDES AND IMPROVES ACCESS TO PARKS BY ACQUIRING LAND, DEVELOPING THE INFRASTRUTURE FOR PUBLIC ACCESS, AND PROMOTING PUBLIC POLICY. OSILT ENTERS INTO PUBLIC/PRIVATE PARTNERSHIPS WITH GOVERNMENT AGENCIES OR PARTNERS WITH OTHER CONSERVATION ORGANIZATIONS TO DESIGN AND CONSTRUCT INFRASTRUCTURE TO MAKE PROTECTED LANDS MORE READILY ACCESSIBLE TO A BROAD SWATH OF THE GENERAL PUBLIC. OSILT ALSO SELECTIVELY ENGAGES IN PUBLIC ADVOCACY TO PROVIDE FUNDING FOR LAND CONSERVATION AND TO ENSURE THAT ADEQUATE FUNDS ARE APPROPRIATED FOR THE PURCHASE AND STEWARDSHIP OF SUCH PUBLIC LANDS. OSILT'S WORK, INLCUDES ENSURING ADEQUATE FUNDING FOR THE FEDERAL LAND AND WATER CONSERVATION FUND (LWCF).

ProgSrvcAccomActy3Grp.Desc: CONSERVATION CAPITAL PROGRAM: THIS PROGRAM PROVIDES GRANTS AND LOANS, PRIMARILY TO OTHER LAND TRUSTS, TO PROTECT PARKS AND PRESERVES AS WELL AS WORKING FARMS AND FORESTS IN THE EASTERN UNITED STATES AND CANADA. THIS PROGAM ALSO CONDUCTS RESEARCH AND EDUCATIONAL ACTIVITIES TO IDENTIFY CONSERVATION PRIORITIES AND IDENTIFY METHODS OF ATTRACTING OR DEVELOPING NEW FINANCING FOR PERMANENT CONSERVATION. IN 2018, THE ORGANIZATION MADE FORTY-FIVE GRANTS, TOTALING $7.8 MILLION AND RESULTING IN THE PROTECTION OF 29,978 ACRES OF LAND WITH A FAIR MARKET VALUE OF $52 MILLION IN FOURTEEN STATES AND PROVINCES.

Form990ScheduleAPartVIGrp.ExplanationTxt: OSILT PROVIDES GRANTS AND LOANS, PRIMARILY TO OTHER LAND TRUSTS, TO PROTECT DIVERSE LANDSCAPES THAT INCLUDE PARKS AND PRESERVES AS WELL AS WORKING FARMS AND FORESTS IN THE EASTERN UNITED STATES AND CANADA.

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: PURCHASED EASEMENTS THAT HAVE A RESALE VALUE ARE RECORDED AT THE LOWER OF COST OR FAIR MARKET VALUE. DONATED EASEMENTS THAT HAVE A RESALE VALUE ARE RECORDED AT THE LOWER OF THE DONATED VALUE OR FAIR MARKET VALUE. CONSERVATION EASEMENTS DETERMINED BY OSILT TO HAVE NO RESALE VALUE ARE WRITTEN DOWN TO A $1 CARRYING VALUE.

THE WALLACE ENDOWMENT IS INTENDED TO BE USED FOR THE PURPOSE OF ACQUIRIING AND/OR HOLDING LAND IN THE HUDSON RIVER VALLEY, CATSKILLS AND ADIRONDACKS IN ORDER TO PRESERVE AND PROTECT SUCH LAND FOR THE BENEFIT OF THE PUBLIC, AND SECONDARILY FOR OTHER PURPOSES THAT ARE IN FURTHERANCE OF THE CONSERVATION OF THE SCENIC BEAUTY, HISTORIC VALUES AND RESOURCES OF THE REGIONS. THE MALCOLM GORDON CHARITABLE ENDOWMENT FUNDS WERE CLASSIFIED AS TEMPORARILY RESTRICTED BECAUSE THE GRANTOR WHO ESTABLISHED THE TRUST REQUIRED THAT THE FUNDS BE DEVOTED TO ENVIRONMENTAL EDUCATION GRANTS. AFTER THE TRUST WAS DISSOLVED IN AUGUST 2012, THE ORGANIZATION CONTINUED TO CONSIDER THESE FUNDS TO BE TEMPORARILY RESTRICTED.

THE ORGANIZATION BELIEVES IT HAD NO UNCERTAIN TAX POSITIONS AS OF DECEMBER 31, 2018 AND 2017 IN ACCORDANCE WITH FASB ASC TOPIC 740, "INCOME TAXES," WHICH PROVIDES STANDARDS FOR ESTABLISHING AND CLASSIFYING ANY TAX PROVISIONS FOR UNCERTAIN TAX POSITIONS.
RELATED ENTITIES' REVENUE 2,839,629. CONSOLIDATING ELIMINATION -243,318. IMPAIREMENT OF LAND 804,294. IN-KIND INTEREST INCOME 33,998.
RELATED ENTITIES' EXPENSES 1,494,362. CONSOLIDATING ELIMINATION -243,318. IN-KIND INTEREST EXPENSE 10,652.

AccountActivitiesOutsideUSGrp.TypeOfActivitiesConductedTxt: GRANT TO RECIPIENT LOCATED IN TRANSBORDER CANADA

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: GRANTEES EXECUTE A WRITTEN AGREEMENT WHICH REQUIRES THEM TO SUBMIT WRITTEN REPORTS TO OSILT FOR THE PERIOD OF THE AGREEMENT.

RecipientBusinessName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: D & H CANAL HISTORICAL SOCIETY INC
FRENCH & PICKERING CREEKS CONSERVATION TRUST INC
THE LAND CONSERVANCY OF NEW JERSEY

RecipientTable.PurposeOfGrantTxt: FOR LAND ACQUISITION & OUTDOORS AMERICA CAMPAIGN
CONSERVATION EASEMENT, LAND ACQUISITION, COMM. PLANNING & OUTREACH
FOR OPERATING SUPPORT & STAFF AND COMPUTER SUPPORT

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: GRANTEES EXECUTE A WRITTEN AGREEMENT WHICH REQUIRES THEM TO SUBMIT WRITTEN REPORTS TO OSILT FOR THE PERIOD OF THE AGREEMENT.

BusTrInvolveInterestedPrsnGrp.TransactionDesc: PART VSTEPHEN CLEARMAN WAS A TRUSTEE OF BOTH OSI AND OSILT UNTIL HE RESIGNED IN MARCH OF 2019. MR. CLEARMAN IS ALSO A MANAGING PARTNER OF KINDERHOOK, LP, IN WHICH OSILT HAD INVESTED. IN AUGUST OF 2015 KINDERHOOK ANNOUNCED THAT THEY WOULD BE LIQUIDATING THEIR PARTNERSHIP. KINDERHOOK HAS MADE YEARLY DISTRIBUTIONS AS THEY LIQUIDATE THEIR PORTFOLIO, BUT THEY HAVE NOT COMPLETED THE PROCESS AS YET. MANAGEMENT FEES PAID BY OSILT TO KINDERHOOK, LP DURING THE TAXABLE YEAR ENDED 12/31/18 TOTALED $12,633. MR. CLEARMAN HAD RECUSED HIMSELF FROM ANY DECISION REGARDING THE OISLT INVESTMENT IN KINDERHOOK, LP.

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE NUMBER IN COLUMN (B) REPRESENTS THE NUMBER OF CONTRIBUTORS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION A, LINE 2
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: SAMUEL W. LAMBERT III, BOARD MEMBER, AND HOLLY HEGENER, BOARD MEMBER, HAVE A FAMILY RELATIONSHIP. MR. LAMBERT IS MS. HEGENER'S STEP FATHER.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION A, LINE 6
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE SOLE MEMBER OF OPEN SPACE INSTITUTE LAND TRUST, INC. IS OPEN SPACE INSTITUTE, INC. ("OSI")

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION A, LINE 7A
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE TRUSTEES OF OPEN SPACE INSTITUTE LAND TRUST, INC. ARE ELECTED AT THE ANNUAL MEETING OF THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES OF THE SOLE MEMBER (OPEN SPACE INSTITUTE, INC.) AND ANY TRUSTEE MAY BE REMOVED, WITH OR WITHOUT CAUSE, BY THE SOLE MEMBER.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 11B
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: OUR 990 IS PREPARED BY AN OUTSIDE INDEPENDENT ACCOUNTING FIRM. THE DRAFT FORM 990 IS REVIEWED BY THE CONTROLLER, CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER & GENERAL COUNSEL. AFTER STAFF REVIEW THE RETURN IT IS THEN REVIEWED BY THE AUDIT COMMITTEE. THE REVIEWED AND CORRECTED 990 FORM IS THEN SENT OUT TO ALL THE BOARD MEMBERS OF THE ORGANIZATION FOR THEIR REVIEW AND COMMENTS. THE RETURN IS FILED ONCE ALL PARTIES HAVE COMPLETED THEIR REVIEW AND REQUIRED EDITS HAVE BEEN MADE.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 12C
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: OPEN SPACE INSTITUTE LAND TRUST, INC. HAS A CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICY WHICH REQUIRES ALL BOARD MEMBERS AND OFFICERS TO DISCLOSE CONFLICTS AND POTENTIAL CONFLICTS AS SOON AS THEY ARISE. A CONFLICTED PARTY MAY NOT DISCUSS THE TRANSACTION THAT IS THE BASIS OF SUCH CONFLICT, AND MUST RECUSE HIMSELF OR HERSELF FROM ANY DISCUSSION OR VOTE ON SUCH TRANSACTION. THE PRESIDENT EACH YEAR REPORTS TO THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES ALL CONFLICT TRANSACTIONS AND HOW THEY WERE HANDLED. THE BOARD OF OPEN SPACE INSTITUTE LAND TRUST, INC. HAS THE POWER TO TAKE REMEDIAL ACTION IF THE CONFLICT POLICY IS VIOLATED.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION C, LINE 19
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: OPEN SPACE INSTITUTE, INC. MAKES ITS GOVERNING DOCUMENTS, CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICY, WHISTLEBLOWER POLICY, DOCUMENT RETENTION AND DESTRUCTION POLICY AND FINANCIAL STATEMENTS AVAILABLE TO THE GENERAL PUBLIC. THESE DOCUMENTS ARE SENT TO ANYONE WHO CONTACTS THE ORGANIZATION AND REQUESTS SUCH INFORMATION.
IN-KIND INTEREST EXPENSE -10,652. UNCOLLECTIBLE ACCOUNTS IMPAIRMENT OF LAND 804,294. IN-KIND INTEREST INCOME 33,998.
THE PROCESS HAS NOT CHANGED FROM THE PRIOR YEAR.

DirectControllingEntityName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: OPEN SPACE INSTITUTE LAND TRUST INC
OPEN SPACE INSTITUTE LAND TRUST INC

AffiliatedGroupAttachment.MeduimExplanationTxt: PURSUANT TO REGULATIONS SECTION 56.4911-8(B) AND IRC SECTION 4911(F), AN AFFILIATED GROUP OF ORGANIZATIONS IS TREATED AS A SINGLE ORGANIZATION FOR THE PURPOSES OF THE TAX IMPOSED BY IRC SECTION 4911(A). THEREFORE, SINCE THE AFFILIATED GROUP DID NOT HAVE ANY EXCESS LOBBYING EXPENDITURES OR EXCESS GRASSROOTS LOBBYING EXPENDITURES, THE FILING ORGANIZATION IS DEEMED TO NOT HAVE EXCESS LOBBYING EXPENDITURES OR EXCESS GRASSROOTS LOBBYING EXPENDITURES FOR THE PURPOSES OF THE DISCLOSURE ON PART II-A, LINE 1(H) AND 1(I), COLUMN A.AFFILIATED GROUP MEMBER:OPEN SPACE INSTITUTE, INC. (EIN 52-1053406)1350 BROADWAY, SUITE 201NEW YORK, NY 10018
